config.title: Theme Settings
config.description: Adjust the appearance and layout to suit your preferences.
config.resetAria: Reset all settings to default values
config.languageDesc: Select the language for the dashboard interface.
config.colorThemeDesc: Choose the primary color palette for the interface.
config.themeDesc: Choose between system preference, light mode, or dark mode
config.sidebarDesc: Choose between inset, floating, or standard sidebar layout
config.layoutDesc: Choose between default expanded, compact icon-only, or full layout mode
config.directionDesc: Choose between left-to-right or right-to-left site direction

models.gpt-4oDesc: Best overall capability for complex analysis and chat
models.gpt-4o-miniDesc: Faster responses for everyday Q&A and light tasks
models.claude-sonnetDesc: Strong long-context understanding for docs and writing

tones.professionalDesc: Formal and precise, suited for work and business
tones.friendlyDesc: Warm and approachable for daily conversation
tones.conciseDesc: Direct and to the point for quick answers

scenes.generalDesc: Works well for most admin dashboard questions
scenes.codingDesc: Focused on code explanation, debugging, and tech plans
scenes.writingDesc: Focused on drafting, summarizing, and rewriting content

settings.title: AI Preferences
settings.description: Manage your AI assistant model, tone, scene, and output language.

fields.modelDesc: Choose the default model used to generate responses.
fields.toneDesc: Control how the assistant phrases and structures replies.
fields.sceneDesc: Optimize answers for your current task type.
fields.outputLanguageDesc: Set the language used in AI responses.

aiChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask AI, Shift+Enter for new line...
aiChat.defaultAssistantMessage: Hi! How can I help you today?
aiChat.placeholderReply: Got your message. Connect a real AI service here later.

suggestions.summarizePage: Summarize the current page for me
